description: Fix a safety violation in the dental implant plan 'implant_collision_case.bsp' where implants at Site #30 and #31 are placed too close to each other. Adjust the distal implant (Site #31) to achieve a safety gap of at least 3.0 mm from Site #30, ensuring the implant remains within the bone and maintains proper vertical depth. Save the corrected project to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\resolved_case.bsp' and leave the final gap measurement visible on screen.
